finding.summary: Stereo imbalance: left channel is approximately 4.1 dB louder than right on average.
finding.probable_cause: The track’s audio signal itself has an inherent left-side bias, likely from the source material, because no panning, FX, or routing is altering the image.
finding.confidence_reason: Isolation verified, silence fraction low (0.05), no FX chain or complex routing to distort the measurement; the stereo balance metric is a direct average indication.

evidence_refs.description: Stereo balance of -4.1 dB indicates left channel is appreciably louder.

proposal.reason: Preview changing track pan from 0.000 to 0.100 to test whether stereo_balance_db increases.
